title: How farmers can use 8 herbal tinctures for chronic hepatitis
description: Astragalus membranaceus tinctures may help with chronic hepatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This herb contains saponins, flavonoids, and polysaccharides that can modulate the immune system and reduce liver inflammation. Research suggests that Astragalus membranaceus may inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, which can contribute to liver damage.
